raw_output:
```json
{
  "module": "ticket-management",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "entities": [
    {
      "name": "ticket",
      "label": "Ticket",
      "pluralLabel": "Tickets",
      "description": "Support ticket tracking system",
      "fields": [
        {
          "name": "subject",
          "label": "Subject",
          "type": "text",
          "required": true,
          "description": "Ticket subject line"
        },
        {
          "name": "description",
          "label": "Description",
          "type": "rich-text",
          "required": false,
          "description": "Detailed ticket description"
        },
        {
          "name": "priority",
          "label": "Priority",
          "type": "select",
          "required": true,
          "options": ["P1", "P2", "P3", "P4"],
          "description": "Ticket priority level"
        },
        {
          "name": "channel",
          "label": "Channel",
          "type": "select",
          "required": true,
          "options": ["Email", "Phone", "Chat", "Portal"],
          "description": "Communication channel"
        },
        {
          "name": "status",
          "label": "Status",
          "type": "select",
          "required": true,
          "options": ["Open", "In Progress", "Resolved", "Closed"],
          "description": "Current ticket status"
        }
      ],
      "timestamps": true,
      "softDelete": true
    }
  ],
  "views": [
    {
      "name": "ticket_table",
      "label": "All Tickets",
      "entity": "ticket",
      "type": "table",
      "layout": ["subject", "priority", "channel", "status", "created_at"]
    },
    {
      "name": "ticket_form",
      "label": "Ticket Form",
      "entity": "ticket",
      "type": "form",
      "layout": ["subject", "description", "priority", "channel", "status"]
    }
  ],
  "actions": [],
  "automations": [],
  "navigation": [
    {
      "label": "Tickets",
      "icon": "ticket",
      "view": "ticket_table"
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
{
```
```json
  "module": "warehouse-management",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "entities": [
    {
      "name": "warehouse",
      "label": "Warehouse",
      "pluralLabel": "Warehouses",
      "description": "Warehouse locations and capacity management",
      "timestamps": true,
      "softDelete": true,
      "fields": [
        {
          "name": "code",
          "label": "Code",
          "type": "text",
          "required": true,
          "unique": true,
          "description": "Unique warehouse identifier"
        },
        {
          "name": "city",
          "label": "City",
          "type": "text",
          "required": true,
          "description": "Warehouse city location"
        },
        {
          "name": "country",
          "label": "Country",
          "type": "text",
          "required": true,
          "description": "Warehouse country location"
        },
        {
          "name": "capacity",
          "label": "Capacity",
          "type": "number",
          "required": true,
          "description": "Storage capacity in units"
        },
        {
          "name": "is_active",
          "label": "Active",
          "type": "boolean",
          "required": true,
          "description": "Warehouse operational status"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "views": [
    {
      "name": "warehouse_table",
      "label": "Warehouses",
      "entity": "warehouse",
      "type": "table",
      "layout": ["code", "city", "country", "capacity", "is_active"]
    },
    {
      "name": "warehouse_form",
      "label": "Warehouse Form",
      "entity": "warehouse",
      "type": "form",
      "layout": ["code", "city", "country", "capacity", "is_active"]
    }
  ],
  "actions": [],
  "automations": []
}
```
